description:
This diagram illustrates the hierarchical file structure of a data package for a specific city or urban centre. The main 'CITY' package is organised into four primary folders/categories:
1.  The 'Dataset' folder, containing spatial data in .tif (GeoTIFF) format, which includes components such as a Digital Height Model.
2.  The 'Metadata' folder, containing metadata files in .xml (Extensible Markup Language) format, adhering to INSPIRE (Infrastructure for Spatial Information in the European Community) Metadata Implementing Rules.
3.  The 'Pixel Based Info' folder, containing ancillary pixel-based information in .shp (ESRI Shapefile) format.
4.  The 'QC' (Quality Control) folder, containing quality control documentation in .pdf (Portable Document Format) format.
